summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Pritpal Singh portfolio at https://dinesh-inspired-pm.preview.emergentagent.com. All major features verified working — hero, live IST clock (updates every second), status bubble, sidebar (desktop) with all nav items, mobile nav (hides sidebar on 375px), profile image click labels, resume download (HTTP 200), copy email with 'Copied' state, About progressive paragraph reveal, projects list + preview panel, project detail pages with Problem/Opportunity/Approach/Experiments/Impact/Lessons + 'Next case', Playground, Writing, Certifications link → LinkedIn, Contact socials, CMD+K command palette (opens, filters, ESC closes), easter egg on typing 'product', scroll progress bar, keyword .kw highlights, no horizontal overflow at 1920/768/375, zero console errors on both Home and Project Detail.
action_items: Spec discrepancies (informational only — content is intentional but worth confirming): Playground renders 7 cards (spec said 6); Writing renders 6 items (spec said 5).

Spec referenced testid 'project-item-dinesh-inspired-pm' but actual slugs are autonomous-blog-growth-engine, monetising-ai-latency, moving-targets-india-ride-hail-ads, pocketfm-social-discovery, rapido-radical-transparency. The testid pattern project-item-{slug} works correctly; this is just a spec mismatch.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx IntersectionObserver SECTIONS array does not include 'about' or 'projects' — those sections do not update the active sidebar dot even though they have IDs. Consider including them for full nav consistency.
Hero.jsx PROFILE_IMG is hardcoded to an Unsplash URL — review_request describes it as a 'profile photo placeholder'; ensure this is intentional vs. needing a real photo.
EasterEgg.jsx useEffect depends on `buffer` which causes listener re-attachment on every keystroke — works but is wasteful; use a ref for the buffer.
ScrollProgress uses a className only ('.scroll-progress'); adding data-testid='scroll-progress' would improve testability.
seed_data_creation: None — frontend is content-driven via local JSON files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI flows pass on preview URL. Backend was not tested per request (frontend only). If retest needed, focus on the spec discrepancies in action_items only; functionality is fully working including CMD+K ESC close, easter egg, resume PDF (200), clipboard copy, project detail routes.
